title: Add synchronized_hop_channel function to sim/protocol.py per spec SelectChannel and ccp16-hop.json
description: Implement deterministic hop_channel(sfn: int, eui64: bytes, num_channels: int=8, epoch: int=0) -> int using FNV hash_32 from generate.py as independent oracle (NEVER implement hash yourself). Match pseudocode in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:120-125. Update docstring with exact file:line reference. No dead code, no comments.
